description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish that runs on a schedule, on workflow dispatch, and on release. The workflow checks if the current commit is the same as the nightly branch and skips building if they are the same and it's not a release event. If not, it builds, tests, and packages a .NET project on Windows, and publishes the GUI to GitHub and NuGet packages to NuGet.org if it's a release event. It also updates the nightly branch to the current commit if they are different.
